name: Cinnamon Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 package (11 oz.) refrigerated French bread dough
2 teaspoons juice of lemon, orange or apple
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Unroll French bread dough and brush with margarine using Skinny Scraper.
3. Combine brown sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over dough.
4. Roll dough lengthwise, pinch at seam and cut into 12 slices with a 5-inch Self-Sharpening Utility Knife.
5. Arrange rolls in a single layer in Deep Dish Baker.
6. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
7. To prepare glaze, combine powdered sugar, juice and water in a small bowl.
8. Stir until smooth. Spread glaze over warm roll with Icing Spreader.
